name: Tom
description: Tom is a blue Russian cat with bright gray stripes on his back and eyeless sockets, though he can still see despite this. He is a kittypet and wears a spiked collar with a small skull tag connected to it. The tips of his ears are a light shade of gray, similar to the color of the stripes on his back. He has a monotone British accent and he is a large sized house cat. He is territorial but laid back as well as sarcastic and non-caring about certain things
creator: Fizzy_Jynx
